__doc__: Full ChaosOS Pipeline — Layer 1→2→3→4 in sequence. One command, full detection.
name: ChaosOS :: Full Pipeline (Layer 1-4)
author: 0xSyStEm75928 / LuciFeR0x0systeM

execution_sequence.name: [L2] Process dump
execution_sequence.command: ps aux --sort=-%cpu 2>/dev/null | head -15 || ps aux | head -15

execution_sequence.name: [L3] Stability scoring
execution_sequence.command: LOAD=$(uptime | awk -F'load average:' '{print $2}' | awk -F, '{print $1}' | tr -d ' '); CPUS=$(nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 1); awk "BEGIN{s=1-($LOAD/$CPUS); if(s<0)s=0; printf 'stability_score=%.2f\n',s}"

execution_sequence.name: [L3] Package manager conflict
execution_sequence.command: which brew apt-get pacman yum apk 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} basename {} | tr '\n' '+' | sed 's/+$//' && echo ''

execution_sequence.name: [L4] Zombie reaper
execution_sequence.command: COUNT=$(ps aux | awk '$8=="Z"' | wc -l); echo '[L4] zombie_count='$COUNT

execution_sequence.name: [REPORT] ChaosOS final output
execution_sequence.command: echo ''; echo '┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐'; echo '│  ChaosOS Detection Engine v1.0          │'; echo '│  by 0xSyStEm75928 / LuciFeR0x0systeM   │'; echo '├─────────────────────────────────────────┤'; echo '│  Mode : {{CHAOS_MODE}}'  ; echo '│  Guard: DATA_LOSS_GUARD=ACTIVE          │'; echo '│  Dest : {{LOG_DIR}}                │'; echo '│  Time : '$(date -Iseconds)'     │'; echo '└─────────────────────────────────────────┘'
